Welcome to Mina's webpage!

2021-08-20-Commencement

August 20, 2021

I received a Master’s degree in Clinical Psychology from Seoul Natinal University :) Great thanks to my family!! I’m now starting my Ph.D!!!!

Got admission to PhD program

June 10, 2021

I got admission to Ph.D. program at the Department of Psychology, Seoul National University. I’m grateful that I could work/study/conduct research in my lab for 3 more years and continue my research projects :) Wish and believe that my Ph.D. program will be an invaluable opportunity for my personal and academic growth.

Just finished the thesis defense on my master's degree!

June 7, 2021

Today, I got approval on my master’s degree :)

Qualifying exam for master's degree

March 28, 2021

I just passed the thesis qualification test :) One step completed toward graduation! I wrote a short (10 pages) essay on decision-making related to food addiction. Enjoyed doing a literature search on my research interest, and finding the literature gap &amp; coming with a new research idea!

Workshop for Motivational Interviewing

February 6, 2021

I took the workshop for Motivational Interviewing by Prof. Sung-Man Shin. The lecture addressed ‘motivation’ based on the self-determination theory by Richard Ryan &amp; Edward Deci. It was interesting that the theory defines an intrinsic motivation as a combination of autonomy, belonging, competence, and a sense of goal. After learning these theoretical backgrounds, we could practice motivation interviewing in the practice session. I tried the role of a counselor, and I practiced the OARS techniques (Open questions, Affirming, Reflection, and Summarizing). I look forward to applying what I’ve learned in this workshop at the 1:1 counseling session that I’m going to do in the On-campus counseling center :)
